overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy video game showing a character in a dark feathered cloak exploring an open grassland at night. The character exits a stone structure and walks through fields containing giant sword monuments toward a massive glowing golden tree under a starry sky with floating red particles.

events.description: character exits dark stone archway into open night landscape revealing massive glowing golden tree

agents.ego_description: character in dark feathered cloak walks out of a stone doorway into an open grass field

entered.detail: dark stone doorway frame being exited by the character
massive glowing golden tree with luminous branches dominating the horizon
tall grass covering the open field ahead

segments.scene_description: The segment begins inside a dark stone archway. The character exits into an open night landscape, revealing a vast grass field and a massive glowing golden tree (Erdtree) visible in the distance against a dark blue sky with floating red particles.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland with distant gothic ruins

agents.ego_description: character walks steadily through tall grass toward distant stone columns and ruins

entered.detail: tall broken stone pillars and gothic architecture ruins in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an open grassland under a night sky filled with stars and floating red embers. Ancient stone ruins and columns become visible to the right while the golden Erdtree remains prominent on the left horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: field of giant planted swords under aurora sky

events.description: entering area with massive stone swords protruding from the ground like grave markers

agents.ego_description: character walks through a field of giant stone swords sticking out of the grass under a bright starry sky with aurora beams

entered.detail: giant stone swords planted upright in the ground forming a sword graveyard

segments.scene_description: The character enters a distinctive area filled with massive stone swords planted in the ground like monuments. The sky displays bright aurora beams and a dense star field. The Erdtree is no longer visible as the character faces away from it.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky grassland approaching massive golden tree

events.description: character turns direction to face the glowing golden Erdtree in the distance

agents.ego_description: character continues walking through grassy hills and rocky terrain toward the massive glowing golden tree

entered.detail: massive golden tree glowing brightly with luminous branches against the night sky
large boulders and rocky formations scattered on the hillside

segments.scene_description: The character turns to face the Erdtree again and walks through rocky grassland toward it. Large boulders and autumn-colored trees dot the landscape as the massive golden tree grows larger in the frame, dominating the sky with its supernatural glow.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the confines of a stone structure into a vast, supernatural grassland dominated by a distant glowing tree. It begins as the character exits a dark stone archway into the open night, revealing a wide field under a starry sky filled with floating red particles and the golden radiance of the Erdtree on the horizon. As the character advances, the landscape shifts to include ancient stone ruins and columns to the right before transitioning into a field of massive stone swords planted like monuments beneath shimmering aurora beams. The scene then turns away from the golden glow to navigate this rocky terrain, finally pivoting back toward the Erdtree as the character walks past autumn-colored trees and boulders, allowing the massive golden tree to grow and dominate the frame.
